name: Cameraman vs Skibidi Battle Game
description: Enjoy yourself while playing this exciting action game. In Chapter 1 of Skibidi Toilet Shooter, the protagonists, a group of cameramen, face off against an infestation of skibidi toilets in an attempt to save the planet. This game is fun. A city has been decimated by thousands of skibidis, and no one is left alive. You will control a courageous cameraman who faces them alone. Website Developer <a href='https://kiz10.com/'>https://kiz10.com/</a>
instructions: Controls WASD to moveMouse to aim shoot and change weaponsG GranadaR RechargeF Grab
tags: 3D Games, kiz10, run, Shooter, Skibidi Toilet
